outlets.name: CNN
outlets.headline: Trump departs for Beijing telling reporters US will 'finish the job' on Iran
outlets.summary: Trump departs for 2-day Beijing summit with Xi, vowing to pressure China on Iran oil purchases and Hormuz mediation.

outlets.name: Washington Post
outlets.headline: April inflation hits 3.8% as war drives energy and food prices to new highs
outlets.summary: BLS reports April CPI at 3.8% — highest since Feb 2024. Energy up 11.2%, food up 5.1%. War-driven inflation now undeniable.

outlets.name: NPR
outlets.headline: Saudi Arabia secretly resumed airstrikes on Houthis in Yemen, report says
outlets.summary: WSJ reports Saudi Arabia conducted covert airstrikes on Houthi targets — first since 2023 ceasefire. Saudi officially denies involvement.

outlets.name: Fox News
outlets.headline: Kuwait intercepts Iranian Revolutionary Guard infiltration attempt on military island
outlets.summary: Kuwait captured 4 IRGC operatives on Bubiyan Island with explosives, recalled ambassador from Tehran. Conflict expanding.

outlets.name: Breitbart
outlets.headline: Trump to Xi: 'Finish the Job' — Departs for Beijing Summit on Iran Pressure Campaign
outlets.summary: Trump departs for Beijing telling Xi to stop buying Iranian oil or face consequences. Gives Iran one-week ultimatum.

outlets.name: Al Jazeera
outlets.headline: Golani Brigade crosses Litani River in first ground raid since 2006 Lebanon war
outlets.summary: IDF Golani Brigade conducted 6-hour cross-border operation across Litani River targeting Hezbollah tunnels. 13 killed in Kfar Dounine.

outlets.name: Reuters
outlets.headline: EU extends Operation Aspides naval mission to Strait of Hormuz
outlets.summary: EU VP Kallas announces extension of Aspides to Hormuz. First EU military commitment to strait freedom of navigation.

outlets.name: Euronews
outlets.headline: India launches maritime initiative as Hormuz blockade enters 71st day
outlets.summary: India launches Bharat Maritime Initiative Partnership (BMIP) for Indian Ocean shipping protection amid Hormuz crisis.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: IDF's Golani Brigade conducts cross-border raid in southern Lebanon
outlets.summary: Golani Brigade crossed Litani River targeting Hezbollah tunnel complex in 6-hour operation before withdrawal.

outlets.name: Times of Israel
outlets.headline: Kuwait intercepts IRGC infiltration attempt on Bubiyan Island, recalls ambassador
outlets.summary: Kuwait captured 4 IRGC Quds Force operatives with explosives. Ambassador recalled from Tehran.

outlets.name: Jerusalem Post
outlets.headline: Hegseth tells Senate war costs $29B, requests $1.5T defense budget
outlets.summary: Defense Secretary Hegseth testified to Senate Armed Services Committee on $29B war costs and FY2027 $1.5T budget request.

outlets.name: Press TV
outlets.headline: Iran FM spokesman warns of 'surprises' if talks fail as Trump heads to Beijing
outlets.summary: FM spokesman Baghaei warns US and Israel will face 'surprises they cannot imagine' if diplomatic path abandoned.

outlets.name: Iran International
outlets.headline: Kuwait captures IRGC operatives on Bubiyan Island — Tehran denies involvement
outlets.summary: Kuwait intercepted 4 IRGC Quds Force operatives. Tehran denies involvement, calls it 'fabrication by enemies.'
